brainstorming.title: Brainstorming Sessions
brainstorming.deleteConfirm: Really delete session? All ideas will be lost.
brainstorming.methodFreeformDesc: Collect ideas freely — without boundaries or structure.
brainstorming.methodFreeformQ1: What comes to mind spontaneously on this topic?
brainstorming.methodFreeformQ2: Which aspects haven't been considered yet?
brainstorming.methodFreeformQ3: If there were no restrictions, what would you do?
brainstorming.methodFreeformQ4: What unusual connections do you see?
brainstorming.methodFreeformQ5: What would be the opposite of your ideas so far?
brainstorming.methodScamperDesc: Systematic creativity technique: Substitute, Combine, Adapt, Modify, Repurpose, Eliminate, Reverse.
brainstorming.methodScamperSubstitute: Substitute: What could you replace with something else?
brainstorming.methodScamperCombine: Combine: Which ideas or concepts can be merged?
brainstorming.methodScamperAdapt: Adapt: What from another context can be applied here?
brainstorming.methodScamperModify: Modify: What can you enlarge, reduce or reshape?
brainstorming.methodScamperRepurpose: Repurpose: How could it be used for a different purpose?
brainstorming.methodScamperRemove: Eliminate: What can be removed or simplified?
brainstorming.methodScamperReverse: Reverse: What happens if you reverse the order or perspective?
brainstorming.methodProConDesc: Analyse pros and cons systematically for better decisions.
brainstorming.methodWhyDesc: Explore your topic with 6 fundamental questions: Who, What, Where, When, Why, How.
brainstorming.methodWhyWhat: WHAT exactly is the problem or topic?
brainstorming.methodWhyWhere: WHERE does it take place or occur?
brainstorming.methodWhyWhen: WHEN is it relevant or does it occur?
brainstorming.methodWhyHow: HOW can it be solved or implemented?
brainstorming.methodChainReactionDesc: Write down ideas and build on them — each idea can inspire new ones.
brainstorming.methodChainReactionQ1: Write down 3 ideas — quickly, without judging.
brainstorming.methodChainReactionQ2: Look at an existing idea: How can you expand it?
brainstorming.methodChainReactionQ3: What variation or combination comes to mind?
brainstorming.methodChainReactionQ4: What's missing? What gap do you see?
brainstorming.methodReverseDesc: Think backwards: What would worsen the problem? Then reverse the ideas.
brainstorming.methodReverseQ1: How could you intentionally worsen the problem?
brainstorming.methodReverseQ2: What would be the worst possible solution?
brainstorming.methodReverseQ4: Now reverse: What is the opposite of each bad idea?
brainstorming.methodRapidDesc: Timer-based: Write down everything for 5 minutes. Quantity over quality!
brainstorming.methodRapidQ1: Write everything down — no filter, no pause!
brainstorming.methodRapidQ2: Still not done? What else is on your mind?
brainstorming.methodRapidQ3: What other thoughts are swirling around?

navigator.title: Navigator
navigator.subtitle: Quick access to all features
navigator.dashboardDesc: Your home page with statistics, upcoming exams, open tasks and learning time overview.
navigator.modulesDesc: Manage all your study modules — instructors, ECTS, schedule, links and materials.
navigator.tasksDesc: To-do list with priorities, status tracking, module assignment and attachments.
navigator.fhSettingsDesc: Choose your study programme from preset Swiss university of applied sciences programmes with all modules.
navigator.studienplanDesc: Long-term semester planning with milestones and goals for your entire degree.
navigator.calendarDesc: Month and week view of all appointments, exams and deadlines at a glance.
navigator.timelineDesc: Visual timeline of your semester with all important milestones and deadlines.
navigator.stundenplanDesc: Your weekly schedule with rooms, times and modules — automatically from your modules.
navigator.examsDesc: Manage all exam dates — with type, weighting, permitted aids and attachments.
navigator.notesDesc: Rich-text notes with checklists, module assignment and flow view of all note sources.
navigator.documentsDesc: Central directory of all documents, links and attachments — by module, task and exam.
navigator.knowledgeDesc: Define learning goals per module and track your knowledge level for targeted exam preparation.
navigator.mindmapsDesc: Create visual mind maps to recognise connections and structure topics.
navigator.brainstormingDesc: AI-supported idea collection with various brainstorming methods.
navigator.flashcardsDesc: Create learning cards and learn effectively using spaced repetition.
navigator.mathDesc: Calculator, equation solver, matrices, plotter, constants and formula collection.
navigator.timerDesc: Pomodoro timer and stopwatch — track your learning time per module with notes.
navigator.gradesDesc: Grade overview with average, passed/failed and module breakdown.
navigator.creditsDesc: Track ECTS progress — how many credits you've already earned and what's still needed.
navigator.settingsDesc: Manage profile, account, notifications and app settings.
navigator.aboutDesc: Information about Semetra Workspace, version, changelog and contact.
navigator.prepareExamHint: Check learning goals, learn flashcards, review notes
navigator.completeTaskHint: View open tasks and tick them off
navigator.brainstormIdeasHint: Start brainstorming session with various methods
navigator.writeNotesHint: Create a new note or find existing ones
about.title: Semetra Workspace
about.mission: Semetra Workspace helps students at universities of applied sciences and universities in Europe to organise and achieve their learning goals efficiently. With intelligent AI support, flexible offline access and European data protection, we make studying more productive and stress-free.
about.featureAiDesc: Generate flashcards, summaries and exam questions automatically with AI support. Learn more efficiently with intelligent suggestions.
about.featureModulesDesc: Manage your modules, track ECTS credits, plan exams and monitor your grades — all organised at a glance.
about.featureCrossPlatformDesc: Use Semetra Workspace in the browser, as a desktop app or on mobile — your data synchronises seamlessly and it works offline too.
about.featureSecurityDesc: Your data is secure. We follow GDPR standards and handle your data with the utmost care.
about.platformWebDesc: Accessible from anywhere. Use Semetra Workspace directly in your browser — no download needed.
about.platformDesktopDesc: Offline-first with local database. Synchronises automatically when online.
about.platformMobileDesc: Coming soon. Full access to your data on the go.
about.planLifetimeDesc: One-time purchase — permanently Pro on all platforms. No subscription required.
about.freeFeatures: Module and ECTS management|Tasks & calendar|Grade tracker|Web & desktop access
about.proFeatures: Everything from free plan|AI flashcards & summaries|Unlimited modules|Automatic synchronisation|University of applied sciences presets
upgrade.title: Get the most out of your studies
upgrade.subtitle: One subscription, all platforms. Upgrade to Pro and unlock unlimited features, AI Coach and desktop sync.
upgrade.successSubtitle: Your upgrade was successful. All Pro features are now unlocked — on web and desktop.
upgrade.cancelledSubtitle: No problem — you can upgrade anytime.
upgrade.allPlatforms: One purchase or subscription — Pro everywhere
upgrade.allPlatformsDesc: Your Pro works for web app, desktop app and future mobile app. Activate once, use everywhere.
upgrade.securePayment: Secure payment via Stripe · European data protection · No hidden costs
studiengaenge.title: Import study programmes
studiengaenge.subtitle: Choose your country and study programme — all modules will be imported as default.
studiengaenge.noProgrammes: No study programmes for this country. Please run migration 022.
studiengaenge.noProgrammesFound: No study programmes found. Please run migrations.
studiengaenge.disclaimer: Semetra Workspace is not affiliated with the named institutions and is not an official offering of these organisations. The study programme data is based on publicly available information and serves solely as an orientation guide. All information without guarantee — only the official information from the respective institution is binding. Status: April 2026.
studiengaenge.modal.successSubtitle: All modules from {programme} ({fh}) have been imported.
progate.featureDesc: This feature is part of Semetra Pro. Unlock it and get the most out of your studies.

progate.modal.securePayment: Secure payment via Stripe · Cancellable anytime

settings.proInfo: Your Pro access is valid forever on all platforms: Web, Desktop & Mobile.

settings.syncProRequired: Desktop sync requires an active Semetra Pro subscription.
timer.ctrlSaveEscCancel: Ctrl+Enter to save · Esc to cancel
upgrade.oneTimePurchaseDesc: Pay once, Pro forever. No subscription. Valid for Desktop, Web and Mobile.
settings.privacyDesc: Semetra Workspace stores your data securely in the cloud via Supabase (PostgreSQL). All data is protected with Row Level Security (RLS) — only you can access your own data.
settings.exportDesc: Export all your data as a backup or for import into the desktop app. Modules, tasks, exams, grades, knowledge, time logs, timetable and attachments are included.
settings.exportDesktopDesc: Can be imported directly into the Semetra Workspace desktop app. Also suitable as a backup.
settings.exportJsonDesc: Original Supabase data with UUIDs. For technical backups or data analysis.
settings.countryDesc: Determines the grade scale, passing threshold and labels throughout the app.
